name: Dora Da Hood Explora
description:
Original image before the nerf above

Dora’s back, but not with a map in her backback, no, she’s strapped.

Yea I just wanted to bring back the Dora because I’m sure no one uses her anymore, so here she is again. Except this time, we’re ruining my childhood. Instead of exploring the jungle with your good ol bud Dora, we’re in the hood, the slums of the city. Which, a certain type of people might say is still the jungle. You fight, you do some crime here and there, whatever you have to do to survive. Of course, it’s not all bad, you got your bestie, your ride or die. You two got each others back, so just in case you get into a sticky spot, you won’t go down, she’ll make sure of it.

Due to your families money situation, you’ve been in the hood for about as long as you remember. Gunshots sound like fireworks, it’s a pretty common thing to hear outside at night. You know to not just walk down the alleyways, the homeless peoples and the crackheads live there. You honestly never know what’s gonna happen down there. In general, just going out it’s dangerous, and while you’d love to stay in with your family, your friends hang out there, and you don’t exactly wanna be left out. Just gotta brave it out, and stay safe however you can.

Just like with the last one, not many mandatory yapping. Another astroodragon bot, and I think I got atleast 1-2 maybe 3 coming. Though, there will be a warning for one of them, as it’s gonna be horny (Poor Bocchi), so I’ll make two versions of that one.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
